# cycloid_cloud_account (Data Source)

Look up a single Cycloid cloud account by canonical.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cycloid_cloud_account" "aws_main" {
  canonical = "aws-main"
}

output "aws_main_credential" {
  value = data.cycloid_cloud_account.aws_main.credential_canonical
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `canonical` (String) Canonical of the cloud account to look up.

### Optional

- `organization` (String) The organization canonical to look up the cloud account in. Defaults to the provider's `default_organization`.

### Read-Only

- `cloud_provider` (String) Canonical of the associated cloud provider.
- `credential_canonical` (String) Canonical of the credential currently linked to this cloud account.
- `description` (String) Free-form description of the cloud account.
- `id` (Number) Internal numeric ID assigned by the Cycloid API.
- `name` (String) Display name of the cloud account.
- `owner` (String) Username of the cloud account owner.
